{{CargoOrgan
|name=Lucky Phalange
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10831
|idx=36
|description="All patrons are required to undergo an MRI scan of their hands upon entering the casino. Anyone found to have abnormal finger bones will not be allowed to enter!"
—Casino Venezia Admission Instructions
|skill=
|hp=1236
|def=236
|atk=146
|rush=126
|gene1=In Zombie Form, {race} ATK +60
|gene2=In Zombie Form, {race} RUSH +60
|gene3=In Zombie Form, {race} HP +600
|gene4=In Zombie Form, {race} DEF +60
|gene7=In Zombie Form, {race} HARD +1% (Awakened)
|}}
